transcription.text: Did you know that 70% of the soils on your clothes are invisible? Under UV light, you see the invisible dirt trapped deep down. Try new Tide Pods Hygienic Clean Heavy Duty. For a deep clean, just toss in a pack. Formulated with 10 concentrated cleaning actives that clean deep down into the fabric to remove invisible dirt. See the difference? After being washed with Tide Hygienic Clean. For a deep clean, try Tide Hygienic Clean with a 100% money-back guarantee. If it's gotta be clean, it's gotta be Tide.
